title: Automate connect board columns!
excerpt: Why can’t automations change the status or selection of a connect column? Many of our boards are connected to one another and this limitation has devalued the concept of using connect columns.

posts.author: pedro.diaz (Pedro Diaz Jr.)
posts.cookedHtml: Why can’t automations change the status or selection of a connect column? Many of our boards are connected to one another and this limitation has devalued the concept of using connect columns.

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @pedro.diaz

We’ve developed an app called Connected Boards Automations. Which allows to run robust automations on connected boards column, here’s how it can be used in this case →

Screenshot 2024-07-13 at 20.26.482132×498 25.4 KB

Also worth adding that it also supports -

  1. Automatically connecting items based on conditions and flexible logic.
  2. Automatically removing connecting.
  3. Syncing values between connected items.
  4. Cross-board automations (trigger in the connected board and action in the current board)

You can find it in the monday.com app marketplace in the platform or here - Connected Boards Automations - monday.com Marketplace

Hope that helps!

posts.author: pedro.diaz (Pedro Diaz Jr.)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, can app allow for custom automations? I could not find any recipe that allows for what I’m trying to accomplish. Thanks for sharing though.

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml: @pedro.diaz what are you trying to accomplish?
